_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review and comprehend organizational leadership objectives and guidance for planning.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.503), LS-A-005 (LS, cosine: 0.466).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.381). Shared vocabulary: [objectives, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [comprehend, guidance, leadership, planning, review] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.903, R=0.875). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Review and comprehend organizational leadership objectives and guidance for plan" and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.533 > STS 0.381 (gap +0.152). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [objectives, organizational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [objectives, organizational]. DCWF-only: [comprehend, guidance, leadership, planning, review]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].
